items.name_en: New Mini Shoulder Bag is Here
items.name_cn:
New Mini Shoulder Bag is Here
A new member has been added to the Kelly family. I was instantly obsessed with the online photos, and the first time I saw the real thing, it felt like an enlarged version of the Kelly To Go. The bottom length is similar to the Kelly 28. The bag's thickness is about the same as the second generation, and the capacity is excellent. The shoulder strap is detachable but not adjustable in length. However, it is easy to carry regardless of height. Detach the strap to turn it into a clutch with a bit of a Kelly Cut vibe, very commanding. In short, the look and practicality are both on point, highly recommended. 27.5✕15✕5

items.name_en: Shipped 😎 Exclusive first release ZP prototype
items.name_cn:
Shipped 😎 Exclusive first release ZP prototype
Kelly Elan Calfskin 27cm 18 Grey Gold Hardware
A true first underarm bag in the Kelly family; no flaws in capacity, thickness, or strap length. A bag with very high daily usage~
Graceful slender silhouette, calfskin with full vintage vibes, perfect storage. Strap length and underarm carry are very nice!
